_comment: Profiles decouple WHAT to install from the catalog, so a heavy repo can install light. Pattern from ECC, scoped down. Each profile is a set of skill paths.

minimal.description: The behavioral kernel only. Smallest context footprint.

dev.description: Kernel + daily engineering skills. The default for coding work.

coordination.description: L4 multi-agent runtime: the kernel + the heartbeat behavioral contract.

full.description: Everything shipped. Still small by design.
